docs.text: Sachin Das Email: sachindas@protonmail.com Phone: +91-9074479708 Profile An Electrical and Electronics Engineering(EEE) graduate trying to explore the frontier between Software and Hardware. Self-starter and quick learner having multiple personal projects. Currently working as a Full stack developer in an Ai Startup using Django, MySQL and HTML5. Fluent in English with an IELTS 7.0. About My interest in web technologies started in my college days when I got an opportunity to work for a website. It was not so fancy, but it did the job. From there, I gradually expanded my knowledge, and with each step, one thing was certain: "This was my empire," and I truly felt it. Though I had some prior experience in game development (Unity Engine), being an Indie Game developer was difficult (though enjoyable), owing to the fact that you must be skilled in a variety of areas, ranging from music composer to 3D artist.So I felt more comfortable with web development (though you get a new Js framework every day). Some of my conquered regions include : HTML, JavaScript, CSS/SCSS Python Django, Django RestAPI NodeJS React, Moo, nearley MYSQL, SQLite Android-Java, Unity3d and, of course, I have started messing around with Vuejs.
